/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmission_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libmission_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/mission_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/mission_interfaces/msg/mission__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/achal/omokai_task/ros2_ws/build/mission_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libmission_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
